story_info.title: Riya and the Sleepy Stars
story_info.subtitle: A gentle night-time adventure
story_info.moral: Everything needs rest, and bedtime is for sleep.

main_character.name: Riya
main_character.appearance: Riya is a sweet little Indian girl with two braided pigtails tied with yellow ribbons. She has big, curious brown eyes and a friendly smile. She wears a comfortable blue nightdress with small white stars.
main_character.personality: Curious, kind, loves nature, eager to learn, gentle.

cover.prompt: A Pixar-quality 3D illustration of Riya, a sweet little Indian girl with two braided pigtails tied with yellow ribbons, big, curious brown eyes, and a friendly smile, wearing a comfortable blue nightdress with small white stars, looking up at a soft, glowing full moon and twinkling stars in a pastel blue night sky. She is sitting near a window with a cozy blanket. Soft lighting, children's book illustration, vertical composition, Instagram friendly. Reserve the lower third for title placement.

slides.title: A Calm Night
slides.text: Riya was in her soft bed. 'Good night, Amma,' she said. She looked out her window. The big moon was smiling down. Many little stars twinkled, twinkle, twinkle. It was a calm, dark night.
slides.speaker_notes: Introduce Riya and the night sky.

slides.title: The Watchful Moon
slides.text: Riya thought, 'Does the moon sleep too?' Amma came to give a goodnight hug. 'No, dear Riya,' Amma said softly. 'The moon stays awake. It watches over us while we sleep. It helps light up the dark night.'

slides.title: Sleepy Friends
slides.text: Amma pointed outside. 'See the little birds in the tree? They are sleeping now. Their wings are resting. The colourful flowers in our garden are also sleeping. They close their petals tight until morning light.'
slides.speaker_notes: Show things that sleep at night.

slides.title: Night-Time Helpers
slides.text: 'But some friends wake up at night,' Amma whispered. 'Like the little owl who says 'Hoo hoo!' And the stars, they shine so bright. They sparkle and dance for us. They are night-time helpers.'
slides.speaker_notes: Introduce nocturnal creatures and shining stars.

slides.title: Time to Rest
slides.text: Riya gave a big yawn. 'I need to sleep like the birds and flowers,' she said. 'Yes, sweet Riya,' Amma smiled. 'Your body needs rest. Your mind needs rest. Sleep helps you grow big and strong and happy.'
slides.speaker_notes: Riya connects with the idea of sleeping.

slides.title: Sweet Dreams
slides.text: Riya closed her eyes. She thought of the sleepy birds and the bright moon. The stars kept twinkling, watching over her. 'Good night, Riya,' Amma said. Riya drifted off to dreamland, safe and sound. Sweet dreams, little one.

instagram.caption: 🌙✨ Join little Riya on a gentle night-time journey as she learns about the sleepy world and the watchful moon! Perfect for calming bedtime stories. Sweet dreams, tiny tots! #RiyaAndTheSleepyStars

email.subject: New Bedtime Story! ✨ Riya and the Sleepy Stars
email.preview: Help your child drift to sleep with Riya's gentle night-time adventure.

youtube.title: Bedtime Story for Kids: Riya and the Sleepy Stars | Gentle Sleep Story | Read Aloud
youtube.description: Join Riya on a calming adventure as she learns about the moon, stars, and why we all need sleep. This gentle bedtime story is perfect for children aged 3-6 to help them relax and drift off to sweet dreams. Narrated by a warm primary school teacher. Sweet dreams, little ones!

publishing.instagram_caption_short: Riya learns about sleepy things and the moon! 🌙✨ Perfect for bedtime.
publishing.instagram_caption_long: Cuddle up with your little one for a magical bedtime adventure! ✨🌙 'Riya and the Sleepy Stars' takes children on a gentle journey with Riya as she discovers who sleeps and who wakes at night. It's a sweet, calming tale designed to help ease children into a peaceful slumber. With beautiful illustrations and a warm message about the importance of rest, this story is a perfect addition to your night-time routine. Read aloud tonight and enjoy sweet dreams! #RiyaAndTheSleepyStars
publishing.first_comment: What helps your little one feel sleepy at night? Share your bedtime tips below! 👇
publishing.alt_text: A Pixar 3D illustration of a little Indian girl in pajamas looking at the moon and stars from her window, with soft lighting and pastel colors. The title 'Riya and the Sleepy Stars' is at the bottom.
publishing.call_to_action: Tag a parent who needs a new bedtime story!
publishing.parent_question: What is your child's favorite thing to see in the night sky?
